items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's performance against Justin Gaethje was highly competitive and has aged well.
items.quote: Paddy Pimblett, as we know, took Justin Gaethje five rounds, made it a very, very competitive match-up. And that fight has aged. It's aged very well.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis's previous injury concerns are not a factor for this fight.
items.quote: I don't think it's going to affect the performance, right? I don't think it's going to be a factor whatsoever.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is physically stronger than Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: He might be physically the stronger guy, cuz he looks very thick and stocky and muscular and strong.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a high-level chin and will to win.
items.quote: you cannot doubt the chin, right? That's a fact after the damage that he took. You can't doubt the will

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is more dangerous than Benoit Saint Denis when fighting off his back.
items.quote: I think Paddy, if he's taken down, he's way more dangerous off his back.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis lacks the ability to submit Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: I don't think he has the ability to submit Paddy Pimblett.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's non-traditional striking angles help him land damage despite technical flaws.
items.quote: The shots come at weird angles, but that actually ends up helping Paddy because they're unexpected, weird, non-traditional angles, but he finds a way of landing them and certainly doing damage.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a higher work rate than Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: Paddy Pimblett is ferocious. He He's got a higher work rate. He's going to go forward.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is vulnerable to being controlled on the ground once an opponent gets on top of him.
items.quote: look at what Renato Moicano was able to do to Benoit Saint Denis once he got on top of him.
